title: Hoffen's Minimal Armor
description: My own take on Minimal Armor based on things I needed in my worlds: Minimal Trim, Visible Leather Armor, Unobstructed Player Faces :D
body:
Hi there! I decided to share the minimal armor resource pack I made for myself that I've been using for a while. 

I included here a couple things I needed in my worlds:

- Minimal armor to see my servermates cool skins :D
- Minimal trims to go along with the armor (some few trims might not show on the armor at all, due to their design placement, this is mostly on leggings)
- Diamond and Netherite helmets dont obscure the player's face.
- Visible leather armor so I can still see armor stand scenes, important if you use mods or datapacks like [Armor Statues by MukiTanuki](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/armor-statues-datapack) or [Armor Poser by Mrbysco](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armor-poser)

That's it! Hope you like it 
Feel free to share your screenshots with me! tag me @_InkGhoul on twitter or ink-ghoul on tumblr

To showcase the trims I downloaded [All Armor with Trims Combinations in 23w04a by SilentPaltos](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/all-armor-trims-combination-in-23w04a/) You can check this world too if you want a preview of all the trims :]
